2603.19831.title: Gesture2Speech: How Far Can Hand Movements Shape Expressive Speech?
2603.19831.paper_summary: Human communication seamlessly integrates speech and bodily motion, where hand gestures naturally complement vocal prosody to express intent, emotion, and emphasis. While recent text-to-speech (TTS) systems have begun incorporating multimodal cues such as facial expressions or lip movements, the role of hand gestures in shaping prosody remains largely underexplored. We propose a novel multimodal TTS framework, Gesture2Speech, that leverages visual gesture cues to modulate prosody in synthesized speech. Motivated by the observation that confident and expressive speakers coordinate gestures with vocal prosody, we introduce a multimodal Mixture-of-Experts (MoE) architecture that dynamically fuses linguistic content and gesture features within a dedicated style extraction module. The fused representation conditions an LLM-based speech decoder, enabling prosodic modulation that is temporally aligned with hand movements. We further design a gesture-speech alignment loss that explicitly models their temporal correspondence to ensure fine-grained synchrony between gestures and prosodic contours. Evaluations on the PATS dataset show that Gesture2Speech outperforms state-of-the-art baselines in both speech naturalness and gesture-speech synchrony. To the best of our knowledge, this is the first work to utilize hand gesture cues for prosody control in neural speech synthesis. Demo samples are available at https://research.sri-media-analysis.com/aaai26-beeu-gesture2speech/
2603.19831.paper_summary_zh: 人類的溝通無縫地整合了語音和身體動作，其中手勢自然地補充了語調，以表達意圖、情感和強調。雖然最近的文本轉語音（TTS）系統已開始納入面部表情或嘴唇動作等多模態線索，但手勢在塑造語調中的角色仍然在很大程度上未被探索。我們提出了一個新穎的多模態 TTS 框架，Gesture2Speech，利用視覺手勢線索來調節合成語音中的語調。受到自信且富有表現力的演講者協調手勢與語音語調的觀察啟發，我們引入了一種多模態專家混合（MoE）架構，該架構在專門的風格提取模塊內動態融合語言內容和手勢特徵。融合的表示條件化了一個基於 LLM 的語音解碼器，使得語調調節與手部動作在時間上對齊。我們進一步設計了一種手勢-語音對齊損失，明確建模它們的時間對應，以確保手勢和語調輪廓之間的精細同步。對 PATS 數據集的評估顯示，Gesture2Speech 在語音自然性和手勢-語音同步方面均超越了最先進的基準。據我們所知，這是第一個利用手勢線索進行神經語音合成語調控制的工作。示範樣本可在 https://research.sri-media-analysis.com/aaai26-beeu-gesture2speech/ 獲得。
2603.19831.author: Lokesh Kumar et.al.
2603.19831.authors: Lokesh Kumar, Nirmesh Shah, Ashishkumar P. Gudmalwar, Pankaj Wasnik
